problem id: e641791f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11111100 -> 11100110
  00111110 -> 01111011
  11010001 -> 10111001
  10110010 -> 01110011
  11110101 -> 11110101
  00100100 -> 01001100
  01100011 -> 11001010
  01010010 -> 10101110

query: 10000000
predicted answer: 00010001
